services.title: What We Do
services.subtitle: End-to-end AI automation and software solutions

items.q: How much does automation cost?
items.a: It depends on the scope. A simple automation starts from €400. A full system with CRM, bots, and integrations — from €2 400. All projects start with a free audit where we give you an exact quote.

items.q: How long does implementation take?
items.a: A single automation: 1–2 weeks. A full system: 4–8 weeks. We always give you a timeline before we start.

items.q: What tools do you use?
items.a: n8n, Make, OpenAI, custom Node.js backends, Next.js, Telegram API, REST APIs. We choose the right tool for your specific case — not the trendy one.

items.q: Is it secure for company data?
items.a: Yes. We build systems that keep your data within your own infrastructure or use trusted EU-based cloud providers. We can sign an NDA before the first call.

items.q: Can it integrate with our existing systems?
items.a: In most cases — yes. If your system has an API or webhook support, we can connect to it. We've integrated with CRMs, ERPs, email providers, spreadsheets, and custom databases.

faqPage.metaDescription: Answers to the most common questions about AI automation, pricing, process, and security.
faqPage.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqPage.subtitle: Everything you need to know about working with us

items.q: How much does automation cost?
items.a: It depends on the scope. A simple single-process automation starts from €400. A Telegram bot with AI — from €400. A full system with CRM, bots, and integrations — from €2 400. All projects start with a free audit where we give you an exact quote with no obligation.

items.q: What's included in the price?
items.a: Design, development, testing, deployment, and a handover session where we walk you through how everything works. We don't disappear after launch.

items.q: Do you offer fixed-price projects?
items.a: Yes. Most projects are fixed-price — you know the total before we start. For ongoing work or larger systems we sometimes use time-and-materials, but always with a clear budget estimate upfront.

items.q: Are there any monthly costs after launch?
items.a: Only if you choose a maintenance plan (from €20/mo). The automation itself runs on infrastructure you own or control. We don't lock you into a proprietary platform with recurring fees.

items.q: How does the free audit work?
items.a: It's a 30-minute video call. You walk us through your current processes, we ask questions, and by the end we can tell you what's automatable, what tools we'd use, and roughly what it would cost.

items.q: How long does implementation take?
items.a: A single automation: 1–2 weeks. A Telegram bot: 1–2 weeks. A full system with multiple integrations: 4–8 weeks. We always give you a timeline before we start and stick to it.

items.q: Do I need to be technical to work with you?
items.a: Not at all. We handle all the technical side. You describe what you need in plain language, we translate it into working software.

items.q: What happens after the system goes live?
items.a: We do a handover call, provide documentation, and offer maintenance plans if you want ongoing support. Most clients prefer to manage things themselves — we make sure they can.

items.q: What tools do you use?
items.a: n8n and Make for workflow automation, OpenAI and Anthropic for AI features, Node.js and Next.js for custom backends and interfaces, Telegram API for bots, and standard REST APIs for integrations. We pick the right tool for the job, not the trendiest one.

items.q: Can it integrate with our existing systems?
items.a: In most cases — yes. If your system has an API, a webhook, or even just exports CSV files, we can work with it. We've connected CRMs, ERPs, e-commerce platforms, accounting software, email providers, and custom databases.

items.q: Do you build custom software or use no-code tools?
items.a: Both, depending on what makes sense. No-code tools like n8n are fast and maintainable for workflows. When you need custom logic, a dashboard, or a mobile app — we write code. We don't force one approach everywhere.

items.q: Will the automation break if something changes in our system?
items.a: We build with error handling and monitoring so issues surface quickly rather than silently failing. On maintenance plans we proactively watch for problems. If you change a system, a quick update is usually all that's needed.

items.q: Is it secure for company data?
items.a: Yes. We design systems to keep data within your own infrastructure where possible, or use trusted EU-based cloud providers (AWS Frankfurt, Google Cloud EU). We don't store your business data on our own servers.

items.q: Where is data stored?
items.a: Depends on the system. For databases we typically use Neon (PostgreSQL, EU region) or your own existing database. For files — your own storage or EU-based providers. We'll always tell you exactly where your data lives before we start.

items.q: Can we sign an NDA?
items.a: Absolutely. We're happy to sign a non-disclosure agreement before the first call if you prefer. Just mention it when you book.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Senior Full-Stack Developer | Web Apps · AI Bots · Automation | 15+ yrs

bio.text: Full-stack developer with 15+ years of experience across banking systems, enterprise software, and modern web applications. I've built production systems for Skoda Auto's manufacturing line, accounting platforms for gaming terminals, insurance apps, and mobile food delivery apps — before fully moving into AI and automation. Today I help businesses cut manual work and scale faster using Next.js, Node.js, and AI tools like OpenAI, Anthropic, and n8n. You work directly with me — a senior developer, not a project manager or junior.

qa.q1: How did you end up in AI automation?
qa.a1: Started in banking systems back in 1999 — Delphi, PHP, payment terminals. Then web, then mobile, then full-stack. AI automation came naturally — after 15 years of building software you start seeing exactly which parts can be eliminated entirely.
qa.q2: What's the most interesting project you've implemented?
qa.a2: The Škoda Auto manufacturing line system was something — real-time data from the production floor, WebSockets, MQTT. But watching a Telegram bot qualify leads and save someone 3 hours a day is equally satisfying.
qa.q3: What do clients usually come to you with?
qa.a3: Everything from 'build me an app from scratch' to 'automate this one annoying thing we do manually every day.' CRM systems, mobile apps, backends, landing pages, AI bots — the full stack, from idea to production.
qa.q4: Why AI — is it just a trend?
qa.a4: Companies that automate now will operate with half the overhead of those that don't. We can add AI to what you already have — as a standalone feature. Or build a complete system from scratch: CRM, mobile app, backend, dashboard — and integrate AI where it delivers the most impact.

mission.title: What I Do
mission.text: I build automation systems that connect your tools, qualify your leads, and eliminate the repetitive tasks that slow your team down. From Telegram bots to full CRM platforms — practical, working software, built fast.

privacy.metaDescription: Learn how AI Automation Studio collects, uses, and protects your personal data.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy

intro.title: Introduction
intro.text: AI Automation Studio ('we', 'us', 'our') is committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and what rights you have under applicable law, including the GDPR.

dataCollection.title: What Data We Collect
dataCollection.text: We collect information you provide directly — such as your name, email address, company name, and message content when you fill out our contact form. We may also collect technical data such as your IP address, browser type, and pages visited through cookies and analytics tools.

dataUse.title: How We Use Your Data
dataUse.text: We use your data to respond to your enquiries, provide our services, and improve our website. We do not sell your personal data to third parties. We may send you service-related emails based on your consent or legitimate interest.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.text: We use necessary, analytics, and marketing cookies. Necessary cookies are required for the site to function. Analytics cookies help us understand visitor behaviour. Marketing cookies may be used to show relevant content. You can manage your cookie preferences at any time via our Cookie Settings page.

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Services
thirdParty.text: We use trusted third-party services including Google Analytics for website analytics and Resend for email delivery. These providers may process your data in accordance with their own privacy policies. We ensure all third parties offer appropriate data protection guarantees.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.text: Under the GDPR you have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data; to object to or restrict processing; and to data portability. To exercise any of these rights, please contact us using the details below. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.text: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or how we handle your data, please contact us by email. We will respond within 30 days.
